name: cds-figma-sync
description: NodeJS service and GitHub App for syncing Figma assets

scripts.dockerup-app: docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d && docker-compose exec app sh
scripts.dockerup-static-assets: docker-compose -f static-assets.docker-compose.yml build && docker-compose -f static-assets.docker-compose.yml up -d && docker-compose exec app sh
scripts.dockerup-trigger: docker-compose -f trigger.docker-compose.yml build && docker-compose -f trigger.docker-compose.yml up -d && docker-compose exec app sh
